name: afo-github-api-mcp
purpose: Token-efficient access to the entire GitHub REST API via a search+call pattern, mirroring afo-cloudflare-api-mcp. search filters a cached OpenAPI index (github/rest-api-description) stored in R2; call makes the live authenticated request. Includes typed convenience tools for GitHub Actions (workflow dispatch, run status, job status) to address recurring deploy-reliability friction.
